arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca insists Chelsea's improvement is "going fast", defends playing style
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca insists that his squad have been on a fast upward trajectory this season, despite currently sitting in sixth place in the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea set their asking price for Moises Caicedo amid fresh Al-Nassr interest
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Moises Caicedo is reportedly a transfer target for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr. Without a doubt, Moises Caicedo has been one of outstanding players...

arts.ttl: Richard Keys Shares Worrying Behind-the-Scenes Chelsea Update
arts.sum: Chelsea haven't been at their best for the past few months of the season and Richard Keys has laid into their playing squad

arts.ttl: Maresca defends Chelsea style amid fan discontent
arts.sum: Chelsea are moving in the right direction and developing a playing style that will help them in the long run, coach Enzo Maresca said on Wednesday in an impassioned defence of his players who were jeered over the weekend.

arts.ttl: Chelsea set to fend off Saudi interest in £115m star with Cristiano Ronaldo's Al-Nassr circling
arts.sum: The Saudi Arabian side had earmarked the Chelsea star as a target for the upcoming summer window, but the Blues have no desire to cash in, as they see him as a key part of their future plans.

arts.ttl: Chelsea youngsters score every goal as England U16 pick up big win vs Japan
arts.sum: The youngsters coming through the Chelsea academy have been a constant shining light whenever things will be tough when the first team squad have been...

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea face Andrey Santos delay, mystery of Mykhailo Mudryk's updated contract... and striker's price is named: CHELSEA CONFIDENTIAL
arts.sum: CHELSEA CONFIDENTIAL: Of all the midfielders in Ligue 1, nobody has made more tackles than him this term, and he is second only to Hamed Traore for goals scored.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams: Why Barcelona have snubbed Arsenal & Chelsea target
arts.sum: Nico Williams is once again expected to generate extensive transfer interest this summer.
Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca urges fans to trust him and says the team is improving under his leadership.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on engaging with Chelsea fans, trust he needs, Conference League
arts.sum: But at the same time I think all the clubs, all the teams that we are involved in the Champions League spot, we are all going to win games and draw points until the end.
